existing_features.title: Update ActivityTimeline component to display 'Activity Timeline' as a sub-header at the top of the timeline section
Display date and timestamp below the 'Activity Timeline' sub-header for each activity entry
Display action pill and outcome pill horizontally arranged below the date/timestamp for each activity entry
Display the comment text below the horizontally arranged pills for each activity entry
Modify the Comment type in backend/main.mo to include action and outcome fields if not already present, and update useGetCaseComments query to return these fields

new_feature_requests.summary: Display activity timeline with sub-header, date/timestamp, action and outcome pills (horizontal), and comment below
